hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|ts)$'; then cd /home/aristo/git_projects/ai_games_site && npm run lint; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"git push completed. Update WISHLIST.md to mark shipped items [x] and update memory files in ~/.claude/projects/ to reflect current project state."}}'; fi
